subject: feat(auth): add client-side anonymous auth with Supabase
body:
Auto sign-in via Supabase Anonymous Auth on first visit. Session
persists in localStorage so returning users keep their forms.
JWT injected into all API requests via Authorization header.

- useAuth hook: session init, anonymous sign-in, auth state listener
- api.ts: reads Supabase session token, sends Bearer header
- App.tsx: gates routes on auth ready (loading/error states)
- USER_ACTIONS.md: server-side setup instructions (enable anon auth,
  workspace_id trigger SQL, env var checklist)

Tags: auth, supabase, anonymous-auth, client
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: supabase-integration
Semver: minor
